# **Continued Learning**
***

:::{.next_steps_box}
::::{.next_steps_box_header}
Common Next Steps
::::
::::{.inner_block}
Discuss common next steps for this type of an analysis in this box. Is there a specific number of steps that you need to do before a specific step? Is a "next step" more of an alternate step?
::::
:::

<!--
Suggest extra exercises using this data for students to practice the skills used in the case study. Perhaps explain how the suggested exercises relate to the common next steps.

Consider basic, intermediate, and advanced exercise suggestions.

Example from a previous case study: https://www.opencasestudies.org/ocs-bp-co2-emissions/#Suggested_Homework
-->

***
